name: react-native-expo-example
description: React Native Expo example using Mockifyer with TypeScript bundle generation

scripts.dev:hybrid:record: EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_BACKEND=hybrid MOCKIFYER_MODE=on EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true expo start
scripts.dev:hybrid:record:tests: EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_BACKEND=hybrid MOCKIFYER_MODE=on EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_GENERATE_TESTS=true MOCKIFYER_GENERATE_TESTS=true expo start
scripts.dev:redis:record: EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_BACKEND=redis MOCKIFYER_MODE=on EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true expo start
scripts.dev:redis:record:tests: EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_BACKEND=redis MOCKIFYER_MODE=on EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_GENERATE_TESTS=true MOCKIFYER_GENERATE_TESTS=true expo start
scripts.dev:redis:record:no-proxy-miss: EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_BACKEND=redis MOCKIFYER_MODE=on EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_PROXY_RECORD_ON_MISS=false expo start
scripts.dev:record: EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_BACKEND=hybrid MOCKIFYER_MODE=on EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true expo start
scripts.dev:record:tests: EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_BACKEND=hybrid MOCKIFYER_MODE=on EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true EXPO_PUBLIC_MOCKIFYER_GENERATE_TESTS=true MOCKIFYER_GENERATE_TESTS=true expo start
